title: taraxacum teuvaeense
intro: Taraxacum teuvaeense is a rare species of flowering plant in the dandelion genus, native to Korea. It has been found to possess medicinal properties due to its high concentration of bioactive compounds, including flavonoids, phenolic acids, and terpenoids. The health benefits of Taraxacum teuvaeense are attributed to its antioxidant, anti-inflammatory, and immunomodulatory effects, which may help protect against various diseases, including cancer, cardiovascular disease, and neurodegenerative disorders. Taraxacum teuvaeense can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or extracts, which are used to treat various health conditions, although more research is needed to confirm its efficacy and safety.
